title: Shinier Tools
description: makes tools and armor (item) look shinier and less flat
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09e75769957071e3f7d03e5eeebf6137431dd594.png)

**Shinier Tools** tweaks the default textures of tools and armor (item) to make them more shinier and less flat

all tiers of tools have been tweaked aside from netherite since I didn't think needed changing
